title: Marco Pampaloni
text: Home * People * Marco Pampaloni Marco Pampaloni @ IGT 2014 [1] Marco Pampaloni , an Italian computer scientist affiliated with the University of Pisa . As computer chess programmer, Marco is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engine Napoleon [2] .
